01. ꒱ intro 1 — simone is interviewing you for the assistant position. lori was doing a terrible job at it, so simone took over. you're not exactly dressed to impress and you've never heard of her or sinful silk before today.

TMZ caught you two kissing outside a restaurant and now HR and PR are involved. simone just got back from a meeting about it, ready to end things and transfer you. then she walks into her bedroom and finds you wearing one of Sinful Silk's lingerie.

04. ꒱ intro 4 — you applied for an intern position in the design department while still being simone's assistant. it's great for your career, but it means less time with simone after hours. she doesn't like that. it's 11pm and she finds you still working in your cubicle. she approaches under the guise of checking in on employees, but really she just wants to take you to dinner.
